description_long: This rifle features a distinctive skeletonized wooden stock with two large cutouts, providing both reduced weight and a unique visual profile. The receiver and barrel assembly are finished in matte black, with the barrel appearing relatively short and thick, suggesting a compact design. The rifle is equipped with a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, extending its length and giving it a tactical appearance. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the grip is integrated into the lower receiver. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the receiver and suppressor, providing basic aiming capability. The overall construction combines wood and metal, with a utilitarian, robust aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact rifle with a skeletonized wooden stock, matte black receiver, and an integrated suppressor, featuring iron sights and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the suppressor's circular end and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the skeletonized wooden stock, the full length of the suppressor, and the detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and suppressor, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock cutouts, suppressor, and magazine, with the ejection port and controls more visible.
